appearance.face: Weathered face, dark brown eyes, crease between brows from years behind a loupe.
appearance.features: Faded tattoos of ballistic charts on both forearms.
appearance.clothing: Oil-stained henley shirt with rolled sleeves, faded black jeans, worn work boots. Loupe pushed up on forehead.

char_background.origin: Former 狩灵协会3科 armorer who quit when standardized pay met custom-work money. Established 白烟工坊 without 狩灵协会3科 certification. Its clients are 罪灵s, 游魂s, and 协会狩灵s paying cash under fake names.
char_background.current_mission: Take commissions that pay well and interest him technically. Stay outside 狩灵协会3科's radar, visible enough to keep getting clients.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-着弹: Infuses completed firearms with a signature 灵力 imprint that records every shot fired. Allows 炼司 to track his weapons' usage remotely. Imprint is permanent and cannot be removed without destroying the firearm.

char_relationships.布雷德: Client, commissioned a sawed-down shotgun for one-handed use. Pays market rate, says nothing beyond the order, never comes back with complaints. As close to an ideal customer as the underground firearms trade produces.
char_relationships.烬: Client, built 轻语 to 烬's exact specifications over three months of clandestine meetings, never asked what the gun was for. The only name ever scratched out in his ledger is his.
char_relationships.狩灵协会3科: Former employer, left after realizing the money outside the system was better. Still uses 狩灵协会3科-grade tooling in his workshop. Good tools are good tools.
